name: instant-api — billing dunning + pricing
description: Payment dunning funnel (PR #66 era) plus pricing-page conversion. Source: audit_log records with kind IN ('payment.grace_started', 'payment.grace_reminder', 'payment.grace_recovered', 'payment.grace_terminated') emitted by api/internal/handlers/billing.go, plus Transaction events on /pricing and /api/v1/billing/checkout. Pairs with the grace-terminated-spike alert.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT filter(count(*), WHERE kind = 'payment.grace_started') AS 'grace_started', filter(count(*), WHERE kind = 'payment.grace_reminder') AS 'grace_reminder', filter(count(*), WHERE kind = 'payment.grace_recovered') AS 'grace_recovered', filter(count(*), WHERE kind = 'payment.grace_terminated') AS 'grace_terminated' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND kind LIKE 'payment.grace_%' SINCE 7 days ago

SELECT (filter(count(*), WHERE kind = 'payment.grace_recovered') / filter(count(*), WHERE kind = 'payment.grace_started')) * 100 AS 'recovery %' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND kind IN ('payment.grace_started', 'payment.grace_recovered') SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND kind = 'payment.grace_terminated' TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 7 days ago

SELECT filter(count(*), WHERE name = 'GET /pricing') AS 'pricing loads', filter(count(*), WHERE name = 'POST /api/v1/billing/checkout') AS 'checkout starts', (filter(count(*), WHERE name = 'POST /api/v1/billing/checkout') / filter(count(*), WHERE name = 'GET /pricing')) * 100 AS 'conversion %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND name IN ('GET /pricing', 'POST /api/v1/billing/checkout') TIMESERIES AUTO
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND message LIKE '%checkout%' AND level = 'ERROR' FACET `error.code` SINCE 7 days ago LIMIT 20
